verses.text: But he is not here. He has risen from death as he said he would. Come and see the place where his body was.
The next day John saw Jesus coming toward him. John said Look the Lamb of God. He takes away the sins of the world.
Patience and encouragement come from God. And I pray that God will help you all agree with each other the way Jesus Christ wants.
If a person believes in me rivers of living water will flow out from his heart. This is what the Scripture says.
Yes, everyone who continues asking will receive. He who continues searching will find. And he who continues knocking will have the door opened for him.
A deer thirst for a stream of water. In the same way, I thirst for you God.
Stay awake and pray for strength against temptation. Your spirit wants to do what is right. But your body is weak.
Father, I want these people that you have given me to be with me in every place I am. I want them to see my glory. This is the glory you gave me because you loved me before the world was made.
Being sorry in the way God wants makes a person change his heart and life. This leads to salvation and we cannot be sorry for that. But the kind of sorrow the world has will bring death.
You have never asked for anything in my name. Ask and you will receive. And your joy will be the fullest joy.
When I'm afraid, I will trust you.
When you pass through the waters, I will be with you. When you cross rivers, you will not drown. When you walk through fire, you will not be burned. The flames will not hurt you.
Only he can do great miracles. His love continues forever. And I will live in the House of the Lord forever.
Surely your goodness and love will be with me all my life.
My dear children, you belong to God. So you have defeated them because God's spirit who is in you, is greater than the devil, who is the world.
If you ask me for anything in my name, I will do it.
Jesus said: Don’t let your hearts be troubled. Trust in God. And trust in me.
Trust the Lord with all your heart. Don't depend on your understanding. Remember the Lord in everything you do and he will give you success.
Give thanks to the Lord and pray to him. Tell the nations what he has done.
I give you a new command: Love each other. You must love each other as I have loved you.
If one of you is having troubles, he should pray. If one of you is happy, he should sing praises.
If one of you wants to become first, then he must serve the rest of you like a slave.
We have been made right with God because of our faith. So we have peace with God through our Lord Jesus Christ.
I am the good shepherd. The good shepherd gives his life for the sheep.
He who sees me sees the One who sent me. I have come as light into the world so that whoever believes in me would not stay in darkness.
Give all worries to him, because he cares for you.
Love the Lord your God with all your heart, soul and mind.
Lord, you are my God. I honor you and praise you. You have done amazing things.
On earth, people marry each other. But those who will be worthy to be raised from death will not marry.
The Lord did this, and it is wonderful to us.
The stone that the builders did not want became the cornerstone.
I am the way, the truth and the life. The only way to the Father is through me.
Depend on the Lord and his strength. Always go to him for help.
The most important thing is to complete my mission and tell people the Good News about God’s grace.
If you believe that what you say will happen, God will do it for you.
I have fought the good fight. I have finished the race. I have kept the faith.
People everywhere will know the Lord’s greatness.
Praise to the Son of David! God bless the one who comes in the name of the Lord!
The grass dies, and the flowers fall. But the word of our God will live forever.
Whatever is true, whatever is noble, whatever is right, think about such things.
